---
name: Contribute a place
about: Share local knowledge — a climb, viewpoint, hazard, bike-friendly stay, water/food, or great ride
title: "[place] "
labels: contribution
---

> The contribution system isn't live yet, so this is how to seed the Commons for now — we curate
> submissions in as the data layer fills. **Objective, mappable facts** (water points, repair
> stations, surfaces) are best added straight to [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org);
> they flow into the Commons. Use this for the cycling-specific, curated layer.

**What is it?**
e.g. climb · viewpoint · hazard · bike-friendly stay · water / food · quality ride · history & culture · other

**Where?**
Place name and region — plus coordinates or an OpenStreetMap link if you have them.

**Why it's worth it**
What makes it good (or, for a hazard, what to watch for) — a sentence or two in your own words.

**Surface & traffic** *(for a road, climb, or ride)*
e.g. asphalt / gravel, smooth / rough; quiet / busy.

**Source**
Did you observe it yourself? Your own photo? An open source we can cite? Please **don't** paste
data copied from a closed or commercial database.

**Anything else**
Optional — links, your own photo, bike-type suitability, season notes.
